creator: simond@irrelevant.org
text:
On Mon, 2006-12-04 at 10:50 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/squirrelmail,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/106306 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106306

The one I submitted is at ports/106301 which does exactly the same, feel
free to commit either one
